arts.ttl: Match Ratings: BVB victorious over Zagreb
arts.sum: Ray Bensebaini doubled the lead through a Pascal Groß corner kick, and finally Serhou Guirassy found space with a mature finish to secure three points. The opening goal came late in the first half, as Jamie Gittens dribbled around Zagreb’s defender, finishing an impressive shot that looked rather similar to many of his goals this season.

arts.ttl: Report: Choupo-Moting finds new work after leaving Bayern Munich...with Red Bull
arts.sum: Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting will join New York Red Bulls [in the MLS]. Who knew Eric-Maxim Choupo-Moting would stay at Bayern Munich for four years?

arts.ttl: Breaking: Report indicates Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies had late night run-in with police
arts.sum: With an estimated blood alcohol level of 0.6 g/l, Alphonso Davies was arrested while drunk driving a Lamborghini on the night of Thursday to Friday, German media outlet Bild reported. Note: This is a compilation of several posts based on a report by Bild involving a potential police matter involving Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich won’t discipline Alphonso Davies for police incident
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Kerry Hau, Bayern Munich will not punish left-back Alphonso Davies ahead of the team’s showdown with Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker on Saturday: As indicated by Hau, Davies was present at the final session and — as far as Bayern Munich is concerned — there is nothing to see here.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany eager to experience first Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Dortmund tussle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany knows a thing or two about experiencing a big game atmosphere. It’s going to be a tough game,” said Kompany (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bayern edge ahead of Real Madrid in the race for Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: But the Spanish giants have fallen off the pace according to The Athletic : Leverkusen are demanding more than 100 million euros (around 1.05 million dollars) for the 21-year-old striker - a figure that considerably complicates the Madrid’s aspirations. In addition to that, there is always the possibility that Xabi Alonso could return to his old club to take over the reins from Carlo Ancelotti next year.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Der Klassiker returns for the 136th time on Saturday as Borussia Dortmund take on the league leaders Bayern Munich. Dortmund have recently found some positive form after a difficult spell…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Bayern Munich Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: The latest instalment of Der Klassiker takes place on Saturday evening, as Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich make the trip to face Borussia Dortmund. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a predicti...

arts.ttl: “We will win it”— Borussia Dortmund’s managing director expects no less than a victory in weekend clash against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Incredibly, despite some poor away form, Borussia Dortmund have a 100% winning record across eight games at home in the Bundesliga and the Champions League . Bayern Munich go into the weekend’s clash against Borussia Dortmund in the Bundesliga, a clash the Bundesliga has tried to push the name “ Der Klassiker ” on as a marketing gimmick, in strong form.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Real Madrid aiming for big summer to damage Bayern Munich; Bundesliga, DFB-Pokal predictions; Bayern seems open to January loans for youngsters; Throwing it back to Danzig; and MORE!
arts.sum: Amid all of this, one thing is clear — Real Madrid and Bayern Munich will be butting heads over a couple of very key players, who could influence the future for both teams. Prediction: Borussia Dortmund 1-2 Bayern Munich
